name: ytm-enhancer
description: A modular, cross-browser extension that enhances the YouTube Music web experience
author: John Gorman

scripts.dev:build:wc: pnpm run dev:build:chrome && pnpm run dev:build:firefox && pnpm run dev:build:edge
scripts.build: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:firefox && pnpm run build:edge
scripts.lint:addons:firefox: pnpm run build:firefox && pnpm run lint:addons:firefox:dist
scripts.lint:addons:firefox:zip: pnpm run package && pnpm run lint:addons:firefox:zip:built
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run dev:build:wc && playwright test tests/e2e
scripts.test:e2e:chrome: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run dev:build:chrome && playwright test tests/e2e --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:edge: pnpm run dev:build:edge && playwright test tests/e2e --project=edge
scripts.test:e2e:firefox: pnpm run dev:build:firefox && playwright test tests/e2e --project=firefox
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run css:dead && pnpm run data-role:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run lint:addons:firefox
scripts.validate: pnpm run format && pnpm run check && pnpm run build && pnpm run lint:addons:firefox:dist
